g.text: Functorial lifting, reuse of f within a functor
Ff :: Fa ⟶ Fb (for a functor F)

g.title: Function that takes a value of type a and produces a value of type b
Function f is lifted in the functor Ff = fmap f. Note that fmap depends on F! To apply f you let the fmap of the functor do the job.
Function f is lifted in the List: Apply f on each element inside the list
Function f is lifted in the Maybe functor.
Function f is lifted in the product functor (., string): apply f to the first element, keep the string component unchanged.
